_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Dasnac Burj Noida
project.address: Plot No. GH-05, The Jewel of Noida, Sector 75, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201304
project.description: Dasnac Burj Noida is an ultra-luxury signature ready-to-move skyscraper in Sector 75, Noida, featuring private lift lobbies, private jacuzzi balconies, and India's first hanging infinity pool.
project.long_description: Dasnac Burj Noida is a highly exclusive, ready-to-move-in vertical luxury landmark spread over 1.27 acres in Sector 75, Noida. Developed by the highly acclaimed premium builder Dasnac Group, the project comprises a single iconic signature tower rising G+35 floors with just 131 residences, crafted specifically for buyers prioritizing privacy and vertical scale over multi-acre mass housing. The development features spectacular design elements, most notably India's first hanging infinity pool, private balcony jacuzzi provisions, and private elevator lobbies opening directly into individual living zones. Standard interior specifications are ultra-premium, featuring full imported Italian marble flooring in central areas, solid wood bedroom layouts, multi-split pre-ducted VRV air conditioning, and smart home automation touch panels. The gated tower offers beautifully curated lifestyle amenities including an operational rooftop lounge, a state-of-the-art gym, a children's play area, and premium concierge lobbies. Strategically located right next to the Noida Golf Course corridor, the project delivers 100% active registrations, clean legal titles, and zero construction delays.
marketing_claims: Private Elevator Lobby to Individual Living Rooms
Hanging Jacuzzi Provisions in Private Balconies
Full Imported Italian Marble & VRV Air Conditioning
100% Active Flat Registrations with CC/OC Received
project.project_risk_flag: None: Flawless legal title, fully completed with CC/OC and active flat registries.

builder.name: Dasnac Group
builder.company_overview: Dasnac Group is a highly acclaimed, research-driven real estate developer and engineering firm operating in Delhi NCR for over three decades. Led by C-suite professionals and engineering scholars, the developer is recognized for its high architectural accuracy, premium construction finishes, and a stellar history of delivering projects ahead of schedule, with flagship layouts including The Jewel of Noida and Burj Noida.

unit_types.name: 3 BHK (Burj Executive)
unit_types.subtitle: Ultra-Luxury 3 BHK with Jacuzzi Provision
unit_types.description: Extremely premium, spacious 3 BHK. Features India's first private hanging jacuzzi provision in the balcony, expansive central living-dining hall, private elevator lobby, and premium Italian marble floors.

unit_types.name: 4 BHK (Burj Grande)
unit_types.subtitle: Palatial 4 BHK with private elevator lobby
unit_types.description: Sprawling 4 BHK layout featuring solid wooden double doors, dedicated utility and servant rooms, walk-in dressing wardrobes, and direct golf course views.
whats_included: Imported marble and solid hardwood flooring

unit_types.name: 5 BHK / Penthouse (Burj Sovereign)
unit_types.subtitle: Palatial Sovereign Penthouse Suite
unit_types.description: Ultra-exclusive sovereign duplex penthouse with double-height ceilings, sprawling terrace garden with private hanging pool, and premium home theater room.

connectivity.name: Medanta Super-Speciality Hospital
connectivity.notes: Premium emergency healthcare across the road

assumptions: Ready-to-move premium resale purchase. GST is 0%.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Dasnac Burj Noida is the ultimate flagship ready-to-move-in luxury skyscraper in Central Noida, combining architectural precision, private elevator lobbies, and a flawless legal title.
why_buy: India's First Hanging Infinity Pool: Exquisite vertical lifestyle statement.
Absolute Title Security: 100% physically complete and legally clear with active registries.
Highly Exclusive Low-Density: Single signature tower with just 131 residences on 1.27 acres.
Private Lobbies & Jacuzzis: Private passenger lobbies, balcony jacuzzis, and split VRV cooling.
why_avoid: Compact Land Footprint: High vertical scale means smaller ground-level garden area (1.27 acres).
Extremely High Maintenance: High-end curated amenities command premium monthly upkeep fees.
Entry Barrier: Highly premium pricing limits access to ultra-high-income buyers.
decision_profile.best_for: NRI buyers, C-suite executives, and HNI families seeking a prestigious, secure, and ready-to-move luxury home in central Noida.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Flippers seeking short-term capital appreciation, or buyers with budgets under ₹4.3 Crore.

buyerPersonas.headline: Prestige, Privacy, and Security First
reasons: Private elevator access, low density vertical layout, and balcony jacuzzi provisions.
Clean title, CC/OC received — zero delivery or legal risk.

buyerPersonas.headline: Seamless Remote Acquisition
reasons: Outstanding builder reputation, active registration, and hassle-free remote paperwork.

riskRadar.description: Project fully delivered with Completion Certificate and occupied.
RERA registered, CC/OC received, registries active. Clean title chain.
Hanging infinity pool, high-speed elevators, and automation drive higher maintenance fees.

transparency_checks.label: NCLT Moratorium
transparency_checks.details: No active NCLT bankruptcy against Dasnac Group.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Driven by signature premium vertical tower formats.
investment_insights.rental_desc: Highest range; 3 BHK rental commands ₹55,000 to ₹75,000/month.
investment_insights.market_desc: Strong HNI and NRI segment demand.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Fast exit within 30 days due to unique luxury nature.

persona_descriptions.UPGRADER: Luxury buyers from South Delhi or central Noida upgrading to an exclusive, highly custom ready-to-move skyscraper.
persona_descriptions.NRI: NRI buyers from US, UK, and Middle East seeking highly compliant, prestigious real estate investments in Central Noida.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Conservative (demanding ready, legally flawless, and certified premium vertical luxury)
persona_profile.family_stage: Established nuclear family or HNI couple
persona_profile.work_location: Noida IT/Expressway Corridors or South Delhi
persona_profile.motivation_note: Aims to acquire highly exclusive prestige properties in central Noida with private lobbies, direct golf views, and hanging pool configurations, enjoying zero delivery or legal risk.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: The absolute benchmark of vertical ready-to-move luxury and legal safety in Sector 75 Noida. Dasnac Burj offers zero-compromise construction finish and 100% active registrations.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Ultra-luxury end-use. Private elevator access, private balconies with jacuzzi provisions, and curated rooftop lounge areas make daily life exceptionally prestigious.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Stellar wealth preservation play with robust capital appreciation and premium renter demand.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Secure vertical gated tower with high security and immediate proximity to schools and Medanta Hospital.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Outstanding rental values and zero vacancy risk from premium HNI renter pool.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Italian marble flooring, gold sanitary selections, split VRV air conditioning, and hanging infinity pools define the luxury benchmark.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Lowest risk profile in central Noida. Flawless title, CC/OC received, active registries, and robust developer balance sheet.
walk_away_conditions: Budget under ₹4.3 Cr — entry is uncompromising at this price tier.
Require expansive land acreage — the project footprint is highly compact and vertical.
negotiation_leverage: Benchmark against ready-to-move luxury in Sector 150 to negotiate marginal discounts.
Limited resale inventory — leverage any cash-flow motivated individual sellers.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Ready to occupy immediately. Proceed with acquisition if a verified 3 BHK signature unit is available under ₹4.5 Cr.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Higher vertical scale; single exclusive tower layout; hanging infinity pool statement.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Larger 5-acre landscaped land layout and massive horizontal parks.
competitors.verdict: Choose Ivy County for sprawling horizontal landscaping; choose Dasnac Burj for exclusive vertical luxury, private lift lobbies, and vertical design.
competitors.price_delta_note: Dasnac Burj is ₹1,000/sqft more expensive than Ivy County.
